title: ampliglossum montanum
intro: Ampliglossum montanum, also known as the mountain tassel fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand and is highly valued for its medicinal properties. The plant contains saponins and other compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Ampliglossum montanum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
